title: Governance Policy
description: Defines a governance policy applied to Agent Blueprint Packages. Supersedes v1.0.0 — replaces the TBD condition string with a structured field/operator/value rule format.

type.description: Category of governance this policy addresses.

description.description: What this policy enforces and why.

enterprise_id.description: Enterprise this policy belongs to. Omit for global policies applied to all.

rules.description: Individual assertion rules within this policy. All rules are evaluated independently.

id.description: Unique rule identifier within this policy (e.g., 'require-instructions').

field.description: Dot-notation path into the ABP to evaluate (e.g., 'capabilities.instructions', 'governance.policies').

operator.description: How to compare the field value. See ADR-005 for operator semantics.

value.description: Comparison value. Not required for 'exists' and 'not_exists'. Type depends on operator.

severity.description: error = blocks lifecycle transition to in_review. warning = informational only.

message.description: Human-readable violation message shown when this rule fails.
